column1: Hey Alyssa, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
hi! our spring break is the week of march 7 through the 12th
Cool I got you! Which destination were we lookin to book
Dope yea Punta is lit that's where I'll be too
How many ppl in your group so far?
Liked “Dope yea Punta is lit that's where I'll be too”
3s solid. You all from the same school?
Oh let's go we got a bunch of UofSC groups. Love yall energy lol
Lookin forward to partying with yall
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
within the next week or two
okay bet yea! I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
Is it cool if I send most of the info through email? It's a little long for text
yes email is perfect thanks so much
Ofc! What's the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
I slid our New Year deal in there for you too. potential for a free booze cruise
yes just got it thank you so much!
yea nppp. lmk what the group thinks
yes i will! thank you again!
heyy Alyssa whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
hi sorry we are still trying to figure it out but i'll text once we have it figured out!
hey okay cool just lmk! things are def getting slim
okay yes what availability do you have for the Occidental Punta Cana
I cant see the full count all I can see is the low inventory alert on my end!
for the week of he 7th and week of the 14th
hey Alyssa heads up, i just got an email from operations that we only have a handful of rooms left. Def dont want you guys missing out
okay thank u for letting me know
sorry we are still trying to figure it out but hopefully we will have it figured out by the end of the week
hey checkin in, how things lookin on your end for spring break?
Hi sorry! How do we go about booking it and can we do 5 days or does it have to be 4?
we can do 5 days! Next step to book I set up your reservation portal for the group. you each hop on, enter an open slot, enter your details, and make your deposit. that then secures you on the trip!
did you see the pricing for the 5 days? if not ill send over. should be in the sample quotes in the email as well but lmk
okay perfect yes thank you! yes i did see it!
okay dope. did we want to get the reservation set up for the 7th - 12th? 3 slots?
we are still deciding on the dates but i think it will be for four people if that's alright
wait actually it might not be four sorry i will lyk for sure soon
okay cool thats fine no worries just lmk
for dates, are you deciding based on flights?
our other friends are going 2 days later so we are trying to decide based on that and flights too
gotcha. lmk if I can help you look for flights
Heyy checkin in, any update on what we wanna do?
Hi yes sorry it took a while for us to figure it out but can we do 3/9 through 3/14
perfect. I can set this up for you now, were y'all ready to get things secured tonight?
yes we are ready to get things secured but is there a way we can do it tomorrow?
yea we can do it tomorrow am thats fine
wait i just got an email but it was for the wrong dates
can we check in the 9th and check out the 14th
apologies on that! I just updated the reservation link
heyy checkin in, were we able to hop on that reservation?
hi sorry we will be doing it tonight!
okay cool. will make sure operations keeps it open the next few hours
just booked it! thanks so much

hi i know my friends were texting u about the clubs. Our school had assigned nights are we allowed to buy those packages for the same nights? It says march 9 is imagine march 10 is coco bongo and march 11 is a free night
yea those nights arent assigned for your school only, its for everyone traveling with us that week
Maroca is on the 9th, Imagine on the 10th, and Coco Bongo on the 11th
if they have a different schedule, they must be with a different tour group
are we able to book the clubs when we get to punta cana?
you could, just not sure what will be available and what the prices will be when you get there
do you know when the prices will go up
ok is there a certain date we need to buy it by?
you have up until 2 days before your trip to add them, as long as there is still availability
yo Alyssa! is Abigail on the same flight as you? or same as anyone else on the trip
hi yes we are all on the same flight
word just added that in! also just emailed over the DR e-ticket link you'll need, and info on where to find our transportation service when you land
did y'all end up wanting to add any party pass tickets or do the booze cruise event?
yes i just saw! thanks so much
we do! we are trying to figure that out now actually!
okay bet just lmk I have a few videos from each spot too if you wanna see what its like
heres the booze cruise vibe https://youtu.be/Is4RzNfxeZg
heres Maroca, outdoor tiki bar type spot https://youtube.com/shorts/oA-3x2q1L-A?feature=share
hi we are doing the party packages now and is there a way we can remove maracoa and add imagine instead to all of ours
we want to have coco bongo, imagine and the booze cruise
hi sorry we know it closes tomorrow so we just wnat to make sure we can get these booked
Yo! Yea don't worry about it I got you
Yo! How was everything while you were here
